component.name: boulderX
component.summary: GTK4 + libadwaita IRC/Matrix client in Rust

description.p: boulderX is a fast, clean GTK4 + libadwaita IRC/Matrix client written in 100% Rust using relm4. Features an Element X-inspired UI with a unified sidebar, bubble chat, per-nickname coloring, multi-server IRC with SASL/NickServ auth, Matrix E2E encryption, channel discovery, log viewer, desktop notifications, and persistent TOML settings.
Rename to boulderX. Add Matrix support and an Element X-inspired UI.
